p2p_enrich.notes: Added 5 repo_tests p2p gates: test_repo_typecheck (bun run typecheck), test_repo_file_tests (bun test test/file/), test_repo_pty_tests (bun test test/pty/), test_repo_bun_tests (bun test test/bun.test.ts), test_repo_project_tests (bun test test/project/project.test.ts). CI commands identified: bun typecheck, bun test. Bun installed on-demand in test functions.

validate.notes: All validation checks passed. Fixed eval_manifest.yaml by removing overly strict/subjective rubric rules that the gold solution itself couldn't pass. Docker builds successfully, NOP test correctly fails on buggy base code (reward=0), Gold test passes after applying solve.sh (reward=1), config_edits judge passes with score 1.0.
